title: Panic Button
description: This mod adds a configurable key-bind to leave, save and quit, disconnect, exit, (whatever you call it) for version 26.1.2.
body:
Panic Button

![Configurable Keybind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24a6ee6203272d80e957cd4fd49be0bc070894d2_0.webp)
A handy dandy lightweight mod to aid in the difficult process which is to leave, save and quit, disconnect, exit, etc.
## ### Features: + Configurable keybind that quits the game (default is " , ") + Works in both Singleplayer & Multiplayer + Now works in version 26.1.2
